steps.title: Find the shared trait
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between Jane and Fafnir. The notes say Jane was a Tyrannosaurus and Fafnir was a Triceratops, but both lived in the Late Cretaceous period. That shared time period is the relevant comparison.

steps.title: Avoid location-only facts
steps.content: Choice B contrasts museum locations instead of giving a similarity. Choice C mentions only Jane, and Choice D makes a general point about museums rather than directly comparing the two named specimens. The best sentence states their shared period. The answer is A.
